title: Ottoman Empire: Medieval Armors and Weapon
description: This mod adds new weaponry, items and armor from the Ottoman Empire during 13th-18th century.
body:
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0523fc8f002cb520223636a2d8084e170365064c.png)!
 

 
 

 

 

 



 

The Ottoman Empire Mod adds elements from the Ottoman Empire to your Minecraft world, it has historical accuracy and includes traditional weapons, armor, clothing, and music. It is the base mod for other Ottoman addons.
 

[Curseforge Page](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/hamzabus-ottoman-empire-mod)

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Ottoman Weaponry including the following: Yatagan, Kilij, Nakkareci, Tabar and Topuz.
A Topuz deals extra armor damage to your enemies.

 

Ottoman Armory including: Janissary armor and a Shishak helmet



Ottoman Headwear including: Ertrugul, Turban and a Fez.




An Ottoman Kalkan (shield). The Ottoman Shield has a special ability, once rightclicked all enemies infront of you get launched back. However, the shield enters a cooldown period for quite some time.

![Description of the gif](https://i.imgur.com/uABhlPx.gif)



You can crafts felts and fabric of all colors to create Ottoman yeleks. (Waistcoat)



 

There are now 2 New discs including: Ceddin deden and Bu bayrak. Both can be found in Desert temple chests.



You can craft a Kebab Machine to prepare kebabs. After crafting Raw Kebab, place it into the machine along with coal as fuel. The machine will cook the kebab over time, and once finished, you can right-click it to collect 12 cooked kebabs. These kebabs can be eaten or used to craft a Shish Kebab for an extra meal option.

 

Steel ingots and Steel nuggets:
By placing an Iron Ingot into a Blast Furnace, you can obtain a Steel Ingot, which is used to craft weapons, kebab machine, armor and the kalkan.

 

Painting of the Ottoman Empire map at its peak, 3x2 painting size.



</details>





You can find all recipes using JEI mod.



You can use the mod in a modpack of course, aslong i get full credit and a link where people easily can find the modpage

If you'd like to support me and help me mod, you can donate to me!
